The model knows that if you push above 50, your days on market is probably going to go up a bit.

So it's using that just to be more predictive around how much you can push on price, or where you're going to lease at what velocity, but not as a hard coded.
You need to stay at the 40th percentile of the market itself, because it wants to factor in to make the best recommendation.
